description:
A mail server is required for sending emails. The postfix package can be installed with the following command: 
$ sudo dnf install postfix
rationale:
Emails can be used to notify designated personnel about important
system events such as failures or warnings.
ocil_clause: the postfix package is not installed
ocil:
Run the following command to determine if the postfix package is installed: 
$ rpm -q postfix
fixtext:
To install the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 package postfix run the following command:

$ sudo dnf install postfix
srg_requirement: Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 must have the postfix package installed.
title: The Postfix package is installed
